messages.content: Got Lily's report card today and her math grade jumped from C to B+! All those evening sessions really paid off. She was so proud showing me.
That's wonderful! It sounds like the consistent practice sessions you and Kevin have been doing with her really made a difference. How is she feeling about math now?

Much more confident. We actually talked about getting a tutor - found one for 60 an hour - but Lily said she likes working with us better. Which honestly saves money right now with all the kitchen stuff still happening.
It's great that she prefers working with you and Kevin - that parent connection probably helps her feel more supported. And yes, avoiding the tutor cost is a nice bonus during renovation time.
Speaking of money, Ethan's been asking about T-ball for spring. Registration's like 120 plus equipment. But he's so excited about it, keeps practicing his swing with a plastic bat in the living room.
T-ball sounds like it would be perfect for him at 6! The cost seems reasonable for a spring activity, and it's great that he's already showing so much enthusiasm.

Yeah I think we'll do it. And we're trying to figure out spring break - Kevin found this lake house rental in Michigan that looks amazing. Kids would love it but it's pricey. Might depend on when this kitchen finally gets finished.
A lake house trip sounds like a great way to celebrate getting through the renovation period! Michigan has some beautiful spots. Have you gotten any updates on the kitchen timeline?
Ramirez says late March now, fingers crossed. The countertops were backordered forever. But honestly after months of takeout and eating in the living room, we're all ready for a real kitchen again.
I bet you are! It'll be so nice to have your space back and cook at home again. The timing might work out well - finish the kitchen, then reward yourselves with that lake house trip.

summary: Diane celebrates Lily's math improvement from C to B+ and discusses avoiding a $60/hr tutor since Lily prefers parent help. Conversation drifts to Ethan wanting T-ball and potential spring break lake house trip in Michigan, with timing dependent on kitchen renovation completion.
